Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Enum Class LoyaltyPgmProcActionType

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<LoyaltyPgmProcActionType>
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.LoyaltyPgmProcActionType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<LoyaltyPgmProcActionType>, Constable
public enum LoyaltyPgmProcActionType extends Enum<LoyaltyPgmProcActionType>

Java class for LoyaltyPgmProcActionType

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <simpleType name="LoyaltyPgmProcActionType">
   <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string">
     <enumeration value="CreditPoints"/>
     <enumeration value="DebitPoints"/>
     <enumeration value="IssueVoucher"/>
     <enumeration value="IncreaseUsageForCumulativePromotion"/>
     <enumeration value="UpdateUsageForCumulativePromotion"/>
     <enumeration value="AssignParameterValues"/>
     <enumeration value="RunFlow"/>
     <enumeration value="GetOutputsFromDecisionTable"/>
     <enumeration value="UpdatePointBalance"/>
     <enumeration value="GetMemberPointBalance"/>
     <enumeration value="GetMemberTier"/>
     <enumeration value="GetMemberAttributesValues"/>
     <enumeration value="UpdateCurrentValueForMemberAttribute"/>
     <enumeration value="RunProgramProcess"/>
     <enumeration value="Crud"/>
     <enumeration value="AssignBadgeToMember"/>
     <enumeration value="CheckMemberBadgeAssignment"/>
     <enumeration value="ChangeMemberTier"/>
     <enumeration value="GetMemberPromotions"/>
     <enumeration value="RedeemVoucher"/>
     <enumeration value="SendMail"/>
   </restriction>
 </simpleType>
